name: praxis
description: Praxis — lean wave-based product delivery unified with Principal Engineer discipline. Three-mode engineer persona (architect / implementer / reviewer), three-tier change triage, mechanical Design Approval, waves, thin-slices, code contribution intake, immutable sprint bridges, hypothesis loops, capability-driven architecture, anti-dumping + sleep + skipped-test + port/adapter-parity enforcement, ADR discipline, Pyramid Test Strategy, defensive implementation, TDD verification.
